message:
test(doom/framebuffer): add 20 tests for draw_column, shading, resize edge cases (bd-3duyd)

Cover: zero/1x1 dimensions, corner pixels, OOB reads, inverted
ranges, y-clamping, full-height columns, inverted/zero-light
gradients, single-pixel shading, channel independence, resize
shrink/grow/zero, clear after drawing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
